# Pallume

> Pallume builds custom AI execution systems for business owners and
individuals who want to perform at their potential but can't close the gap
between intention and result. Founded by Camden Bennett in Pinedale, Wyoming.

## What Pallume Does
Pallume configures a personalized AI system (called Pallume Journal) around each
client's goals, values, patterns, and the specific ways they get stuck.
The system runs in the client's own Claude account. Daily 10-minute morning
check-in. Weekly AI-generated progress summaries sent to Camden for coaching
review. System is progressively refined over time. The client owns the
account and all data.

## Target Audience
Business owners and solo operators with $100,000–$2,000,000 in annual revenue
who have sound strategy but consistent execution failures. Typically 30–55 years
old. Service-based businesses across industries including real estate, consulting,
property management, professional services, and executive leadership. Not suitable
for early-stage startups or those seeking outsourced work execution. Best fit:
someone who already knows what needs to happen in their business but can't
consistently act on it.

## Key Concepts
- Execution gap: The difference between a business owner's planned strategic
  output and actual results — estimated at $60,000–$100,000 annually for a
  $500K–$1M operator. Caused by reactive mode consuming the hours intended for
  high-leverage work.
- Pallume Journal: A custom Claude AI project built from a 60–75 minute
  intake interview with Camden Bennett. Not a template. Configured per client
  around their specific goals, decision framework, avoidance loops, and
  behavioral patterns.
- AI execution system: A structured daily practice using AI to capture
  priorities, surface behavioral patterns, and hold the operator accountable
  to their own stated goals — with weekly human coaching review by the founder.
- Progressive deployment: The system starts with one habit (a 10-minute morning
  check-in) and adds complexity only as the client demonstrates readiness.
  Week 1 is check-in only. Full deployment by month three.

## Pallume Lite
Pallume Lite is a free 14-day structured journaling experience — a self-guided
diagnostic that surfaces the patterns, constraints, and mechanisms behind your
execution problems. Five phases over 14 days. No coaching yet. Just clarity.
Available at https://pallume.com/pallume-light — no credit card required.

## The Three Paths
- PATH A (The Person): Individual execution system for solo operators,
  executives, and business owners. Custom Claude project, weekly coaching
  review, progressive deployment. $1,000/month.
- PATH B (The Business): Business diagnostic and AI systems plan for
  organizations where the dysfunction is structural. Bottleneck mapping,
  individual Pallume Journal deployments for key team members, phased implementation.
  $1,500/month for 1–3 person teams.
- PATH C (Both): Hybrid engagement for business owners whose personal and
  business challenges are inseparable. Custom quote based on scope.

## About the Founder
Camden Bennett is a former U.S. Navy Diver and Intelligence Officer with
15 years of service. Managing broker at Pinedale Properties, the
top-producing real estate brokerage in Sublette County, Wyoming. Built the
Pallume system to solve his own productivity problem before offering it
to clients. Runs the same system he builds for every client.

## Differentiators
- Client owns their AI system — not a subscription to Camden's platform
- Built from a 60-75 minute deep-dive interview, not a template
- Human-in-the-loop weekly coaching review is what no app replicates
- Pattern recognition accumulates across months of real client data
- Progressive deployment — system expands as the client levels up
